title: Cabinet coherence frontier and Gemini review lane
goal: Register the safe path for Cabinet to keep ecosystem coherence, produce Bureau-importable candidates, and use Gemini agents as proposal-only review capacity without breaking organ boundaries.
completion: Cabinet has a schema-bound frontier for Bureau candidates that preserves read-only effect closure.
Bureau can preview, review and receipt Cabinet candidates before any optional one-task import.
Gemini capability and sandbox boundaries are verified before any proposal-only review lane is enabled.
Outcome receipts can flow back from Bureau or Grabowski to Cabinet and later to Heimlern as review-only learning input.
The first read-only status projection is bound to Leitstand; Schauwerk requires a separate resource decision.

metadata.source_decision: Cabinet holds ecosystem sense and coherence; Bureau registers, schedules and delegates only after review; Grabowski executes; Gemini proposes and reviews only after capability preflight.

organ_boundary.cabinet: sensemaking, maps, claims, findings, frontier proposals
organ_boundary.bureau: registry, queue, preview, review, receipts, controlled import
organ_boundary.grabowski: repo and operator execution after gate
organ_boundary.gemini: proposal-only analysis and review lane after capability and sandbox preflight
organ_boundary.schauwerk: possible later renderer surface after separate resource binding

metadata.registration_note: Registered while Bureau PR #169 was open; kept later and does not mutate the queue to avoid stealing the active Bureau ball.
metadata.lifecycle_repair_note: Aligned initiative state with Bureau lifecycle diagnostics after Gemini lane task was verified and remaining open tasks are planned.

lifecycle.repair_source: bureau doctor lifecycle recommendation: active because remaining open tasks are planned and no blocked task remains after CABINET-COHERENCE-FRONTIER-V1-T005 was verified

metadata.supersession_reason: Cabinet frontier, feedback and status projection roles were retired by the roomless Systemkatalog decision.
